services.label: OUR SERVICES
services.title: Everything your cargo needs.
services.subtitle: Six core services. One reliable partner.

items.title: Air Freight
items.description: Urgent, sensitive, DGR, medical and temperature-controlled cargo.

items.title: Sea Freight
items.description: FCL/LCL ocean freight for import, export, machinery and bulk cargo.

items.title: Cross Border
items.description: Door-to-door routes across Malaysia, Singapore, Vietnam, Laos and Cambodia.

items.title: Customs Broker
items.description: Clearance and document support for import and export operations.

items.title: Land Transport
items.description: Domestic transportation 24/7 with strategic hubs and multiple truck types.

items.title: Packing & Repacking
items.description: UN Box, IPPC wooden crate, lashing, chocking and dry ice support.

items.title: 10+ Years Experience
items.description: A seasoned team with deep expertise in international and domestic logistics.

items.title: End-to-End Service
items.description: From pickup to final delivery — we manage every step of the journey.

items.title: Special Cargo Handling
items.description: DGR, temperature-controlled, oversized, and high-value cargo handled with precision.

items.title: 24/7 Domestic Transport
items.description: Round-the-clock truck operations with strategic hub coverage nationwide.

items.title: Cross-Border Routes
items.description: Established lanes into Malaysia, Singapore, Vietnam, Laos, and Cambodia.

items.title: Premium Customer Care
items.description: Dedicated support and transparent communication throughout every shipment.
